      Work in progress: This page is currently being expanded and refined.

      GIS, data management and dashboards for public health

      What can I help you with?

      • Geo-registry implementation and master list development
      • Dashboard development
      • Data collection and analysis
      • Spatial analysis and cartography
      • Health information systems

      What tools do I know quite a bit about?

      • Geo-registries: GeoPrism Registry
      • GIS: QGIS , AccessMod
      • Dashboards: Data Studio , Grafana Dashboards , ArcGIS Dashboards
      • Data collection: KoboToolbox , Ona Data , Google Forms
      • Health information systems: DHIS2 , mSupply
